title: B01 reinforcement stock cannot support the approved near-term sequence
evidence: Verified stock and confirmed deliveries are below the next three activity requirements
potential_impact: Immediate risk of work interruption and critical-path delay
recommended_intervention: Executive supplier escalation and controlled project allocation

title: Tunnel ventilation package lacks an approved recovery baseline
evidence: Vendor dates remain unapproved and do not include client inspection points
potential_impact: Testing and commissioning cannot start as planned
recommended_intervention: Issue formal recovery instruction and deploy factory expeditor

title: B04 coordinated MEP release is required before the next structural pour
evidence: Structural inspection window is booked but coordinated openings are not approved
potential_impact: Cancelled pour and resequencing of concrete resources
recommended_intervention: Approve controlled zone release with signed interface checklist

title: Utility cutover possession does not match the approved construction method
evidence: Authority access window is four hours shorter than the method statement requirement
potential_impact: Cutover may extend across additional nights
recommended_intervention: Obtain extended weekend possession or approve revised methodology

title: Water-tank trial mix must be approved before reinforcement inspection closes
evidence: Concrete booking cannot be confirmed without final durability approval
potential_impact: Raft pour slot may be lost
recommended_intervention: Close consultant comments through same-day technical session

title: Portfolio report is at risk from incomplete project data submissions
evidence: Two project updates remain outside the reporting cut-off
potential_impact: Executive report may use stale progress and issue status
recommended_intervention: Apply reporting freeze and escalate non-compliant submissions
